历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 122201 → 39421 → 25677 → 25721 → 24833. The 2021 data was abnormally high due to the inclusion of the Malaysia campus. Since 2022, the main campus ranking has stabilized around 25000, showing a slow upward trend (decreasing ranking number) in recent three years. The 2025 baseline is about 24833. Enrollment: 129 in 2021 → 99 in 2022 → 127 in 2023 → 135 in 2024 → 138 in 2025, with a continuous slight expansion in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. It ranks steadily at 24th to 26th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide, maintaining strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province: 216153 in 2021 → 297622 in 2022 → 335207 in 2023 → 384426 in 2024 → 363040 in 2025, showing an overall increasing trend. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in the province is 609800. Estimated at about 368929 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of approximately 60.5%, a slight increase from 2025, leading to intensified competition, reflecting an overall rise in competition level. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, not a local university, so there is no local preference. Considering the slow upward trend in Physics Category rankings in recent years (decreasing ranking number) and the increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 leading to intensified competition, it is expected that the admission ranking of Xiamen University for Physics Category in Hebei Province will further move up slightly in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24633, with a range of 24133–25133.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 24133–25133 are advised to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Malaysia campus majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 24000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 25000) are advised to mainly apply for mid-to-late Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 Malaysia campus majors as a safe choice.

From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 6371 → 4247 → 4333 → 3124 → 3215, showing a significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 3156 places from 2021 to 2025, indicating intensifying competition; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3215th place; enrollment numbers: 32 in 2021 → 30 in 2022 → 38 in 2023 → 36 in 2024 → 37 in 2025, with slight fluctuations but overall stability in recent years.
3. [School Level] 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; stable at 24th–26th in the Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category candidates in Hebei Province: 2021: 202096 → 2022: 194469 → 2023: 240794 → 2024: 243704 → 2025: 243714, stabilizing in recent years; the total number of candidates for the 2026 national college entrance examination is 609800, with an estimated 240871 in History Category based on the recent proportion of about 39.5%, a slight decrease compared to 2025, easing competition slightly, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, not a local university in Hebei, so there is no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall upward trend in recent rankings for History Category and the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026, it is predicted that the admission ranking for Xiamen University in Hebei Province's History Category will slightly decline (ranking number increases); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3265th place, with a range of 2775–3755.
